description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a landscaped yard with various trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof design, large glass windows, and a mix of materials including concrete, brick, and metal. The front entrance is accessible via a pathway and steps, leading to a covered entryway. A swimming pool is visible in the backyard, along with a patio area and outdoor seating. The building has a clean, geometric layout with multiple levels and open spaces, emphasizing contemporary architectural elements. The property is enclosed by a low wall, providing a sense of privacy while maintaining openness to the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, pathway, and landscaped yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large glass windows, brick facade, and part of the backyard patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio area, and additional outdoor landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, secondary entrance, and more of the backyard features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
